name: Ceren Yavuz-Kolzeev
title: Ms
bio: Registered nutritionist and founder of CYK Nutrition, born and raised in Istanbul before moving to London to study nutrition. Specialises in weight management, PCOS and other chronic-disease nutrition, sports/performance nutrition and non-diet approaches. One of few evidence-based nutritionists producing content in Turkish, consulting clients from 20+ countries online.

name: Odul Turkay
title: Ms
bio: Registered Dietitian and Registered Associate Nutritionist based in Salford, Greater Manchester, fluent in English and Turkish, supporting a diverse, international client base across the UK and beyond.
